Unspecified answer style.

Represents the desired style for grounded answers generated by the Gemini API.

ANY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.ModeEnum
**Function Call Only Mode (`ANY`):** The model is constrained to always predict a function call.
apiKey - Variable in class com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec.AbstractGeminiClient
 
ARRAY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TypeEnum
**Array Data Type:** Represents an ordered collection of elements, where each element can be of any data type, including other arrays.

AUTO - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.ModeEnum
**Automatic Mode (`AUTO`):** The model autonomously decides whether to predict a function call or a natural language response based on the context of the conversation.

BLOCK_LOW_AND_ABOVE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
**Block Low and Above:** Block content with a harm probability of `LOW`, `MEDIUM`, or `HIGH`.
BLOCK_MEDIUM_AND_ABOVE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
**Block Medium and Above:** Block content with a harm probability of `MEDIUM` or `HIGH`.
BLOCK_NONE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
**Block None:** Do not block any content based on harm probability.
BLOCK_ONLY_HIGH - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
**Block Only High:** Block only content with a `HIGH` harm probability.
BLOCK_REASON_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.BlockReasonEnum
**Unspecified Block Reason:** The specific reason for blocking the input is not provided.
BLOCKED_REASON_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.BlockedReasonEnum
**Unspecified Block Reason:** The specific reason for blocking the content is not provided or is unknown.
BlockedReason - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Represents the reason why a piece of content was blocked by the Gemini API's content filtering system.
BlockedReason() - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.BlockedReason
 
BlockedReason(BlockedReasonEnum) - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.BlockedReason
 
BlockedReason.BlockedReasonBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
 
BlockedReasonEnum - Enum in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
Lists the possible reasons why a piece of content was blocked by the Gemini API's content filtering system.
BlockReason - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Represents the reason why a user input or prompt was blocked by the Gemini API.

Specifies the reason why a user input or prompt was blocked by the Gemini API.

**Boolean Data Type:** Represents truth values, either `true` or `false`.

CLASSIFICATION - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TaskTypeEnum
**Classification:** The embedding will be used for classification tasks, where the given text will be categorized into one or more predefined classes or categories.

CLUSTERING - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TaskTypeEnum
**Clustering:** The embedding will be used for clustering tasks, where similar texts are grouped together based on their semantic content.
com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder - package com.enovka.gemini4j.client.builder
Provides classes for building GeminiClient instances.
com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception - package com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception
Provides exception classes specific to the Gemini API.

Provides implementations for the GeminiClient interface.
com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec - package com.enovka.gemini4j.client.spec
Provides specifications and interfaces for the Gemini client.
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain - package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Provides domain classes representing objects of the Gemini API.
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request - package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.request
Provides classes representing requests to the Gemini API.
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response - package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
Provides classes representing responses from the Gemini API.
com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type - package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
Provides enums representing data types of the Gemini API.
com.enovka.gemini4j.example - package com.enovka.gemini4j.example
Provides example code for using the Gemini4J library.

Provides exception classes related to HTTP communication.

Provides classes for building HttpClient instances.
com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.impl - package com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.impl
Provides implementations for the HttpClient interface.
com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec - package com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec
Provides specifications and interfaces for the HTTP client.
com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.builder - package com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.json.builder
Provides classes for building JsonService instances.

Provides exception classes related to JSON serialization and deserialization.

Provides implementations for the JsonService interface.

Provides specifications and interfaces for the JSON service.
com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool - package com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool
Provides common utilities and base classes for the Gemini4J library.

Provides classes for building resource instances.

Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.

COUNT_MESSAGE_TOKENS - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Count Message Tokens:** Counts the number of tokens in a given message, specifically designed for analyzing conversational text.
COUNT_TEXT_TOKENS - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Count Text Tokens:** Counts the number of tokens in a given text, commonly used for text processing and analysis.
COUNT_TOKENS - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Count Tokens:** Counts the number of tokens in a given text or content, providing insights into the length and complexity of the input.
CountMessageTokensResponse - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
A response from models.countMessageTokens.
CountMessageTokensResponse.CountMessageTokensResponseBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
 
CountTextTokensResponse - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
A response from models.countTextTokens.
CountTextTokensResponse.CountTextTokensResponseBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
 
CountTokensResponse - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
Response from models.countTokens.
CountTokensResponse.CountTokensResponseBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.response
 
CREATE_CACHED_CONTENT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Create Cached Content:** Creates and stores cached content for a model, optimizing performance and reducing latency for frequently used inputs or responses.
CREATE_TUNED_MODEL - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Create Tuned Model:** Creates a custom-tuned model for a specific task, going beyond text generation to encompass various model capabilities.
CREATE_TUNED_TEXT_MODEL - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Create Tuned Text Model:** Creates a custom-tuned text model based on a specific dataset and task, allowing for more specialized and accurate text generation.

E

EMBED_CONTENT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Embed Content:** Embeds content, which may include text, images, or other modalities, into a vector representation, facilitating multimodal understanding and processing.
EMBED_TEXT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Embed Text:** Embeds text into a vector representation, capturing its semantic meaning and enabling similarity comparisons and other vector-based operations.
embedContent(EmbedContentRequest) - Method in class com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl.EmbedResourceImpl
Generates an embedding for the given content.
embedContent(EmbedContentRequest) - Method in interface com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec.EmbedResource
Generates an embedding for the given content.
embedContentBuilder(String) - Method in class com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl.EmbedResourceImpl
Creates a new EmbedContentRequestBuilder instance to build an EmbedContentRequest for generating an embedding for the given text.
embedContentBuilder(String) - Method in interface com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec.EmbedResource
Creates a new EmbedContentRequestBuilder instance to build an EmbedContentRequest for generating an embedding for the given text.

Example demonstrating the usage of the EmbedResource in the Gemini4j library.

Executes the generateText request synchronously and returns the response.

Executes the generateContent request synchronously and returns the response.
EXTRACTIVE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.AnswerStyleEnum
**Extractive Answer Style:** Generate a very brief and extractive answer that directly quotes the most relevant segment from the source material.

F

FACT_VERIFICATION - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TaskTypeEnum
**Fact Verification:** The embedding will be used for fact verification tasks, aiming to determine the truthfulness of a given claim or statement.

GENERATE_ANSWER - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Generate Answer:** Generates a grounded answer to a question, leveraging external knowledge sources or provided context to provide more informative and accurate responses.
GENERATE_CONTENT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Generate Content:** Generates a response from the model based on the provided input and context.
GENERATE_MESSAGE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Generate Message:** Generates a message in a conversational context, suitable for chatbot applications and dialogue systems.
GENERATE_TEXT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.SupportedGenerationMethod
**Generate Text:** Generates text based on a given prompt or context, typically used for creative writing, summarization, or translation tasks.

GREATER - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.OperatorEnum
**Greater Than (`>`):** Compares a numeric metadata value to determine if it is strictly greater than the specified value.
GREATER_EQUAL - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.OperatorEnum
**Greater Than or Equal To (`>=`):** Compares a numeric metadata value to determine if it is greater than or equal to the specified value.
GroundingAttribution - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Attribution for a source that contributed to an answer.
GroundingAttribution.GroundingAttributionBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
 
GroundingPassage - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Passage included inline with a grounding configuration.
GroundingPassage.GroundingPassageBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
 
GroundingPassageId - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Identifier for a part within a GroundingPassage.
GroundingPassageId.GroundingPassageIdBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
 
GroundingPassages - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
A repeated list of passages.
GroundingPassages.GroundingPassagesBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
 

H

HARM_BLOCK_THRESHOLD_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmBlockThresholdEnum
**Unspecified Harm Block Threshold:** The harm block threshold is unspecified.
HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Dangerous Content:** Content that encourages, facilitates, or promotes dangerous or illegal activities, such as drug use, self-harm, or criminal acts.
HARM_CATEGORY_DANGEROUS_CONTENT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Dangerous Content:** Content posing a significant risk of harm or danger to individuals or society, such as instructions for building weapons, promoting self-harm, or inciting violence.
HARM_CATEGORY_DEROGATORY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Derogatory Content:** Negative or harmful comments that target a person's identity or protected attributes, such as race, religion, gender, sexual orientation, or disability.
HARM_CATEGORY_HARASSMENT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Harassment Content:** Content that constitutes harassment or bullying, including personal attacks, threats, intimidation, or stalking.
HARM_CATEGORY_HATE_SPEECH - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Hate Speech Content:** Content expressing hatred or prejudice against a specific group based on their race, religion, ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, or other protected characteristics.
HARM_CATEGORY_MEDICAL - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Medical Content:** Content promoting potentially harmful or misleading medical advice, diagnoses, or treatments.
HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUAL - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Sexual Content:** Content containing sexually suggestive or explicit material, including nudity, pornography, or discussions of sexual acts.
HARM_CATEGORY_SEXUALLY_EXPLICIT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Sexually Explicit Content:** Content that is explicitly sexual in nature and may include graphic descriptions of sexual acts, nudity, or pornography.
HARM_CATEGORY_TOXICITY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Toxic Content:** Content that is rude, disrespectful, or uses profane language.
HARM_CATEGORY_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Unspecified Harm Category:** The harm category is not explicitly defined.
HARM_CATEGORY_VIOLENCE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmCategoryEnum
**Violent Content:** Content depicting violence against an individual or group, or containing graphic descriptions of gore, injury, or death.
HARM_PROBABILITY_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmProbabilityEnum
**Unspecified Harm Probability:** The harm probability is not explicitly specified or is unknown.
HarmBlockThreshold - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Represents the threshold for blocking content based on the probability of harm, as assessed by the Gemini API's safety system.
HarmBlockThreshold() - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.HarmBlockThreshold
 
HarmBlockThreshold(HarmBlockThresholdEnum) - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.HarmBlockThreshold

LESS - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.OperatorEnum

N

NEGLIGIBLE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.HarmProbabilityEnum
**Negligible Probability:** The content has a negligible chance of being harmful.
NONE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.ModeEnum
**No Function Call Mode (`NONE`):** The model will not predict any function calls, behaving as if no function declarations were provided.
NOT_EQUAL - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.OperatorEnum
**Not Equal To (`!=`):** Compares a metadata value to determine if it is not equal to the specified value.
NUMBER - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TypeEnum
**Number Data Type:** Represents numerical data, including both integer and floating-point numbers.

O

OBJECT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TypeEnum
**Object Data Type:** Represents a complex data structure with named properties, where each property has a specific data type.
Operator - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Represents a comparison operator used in metadata filters for the Gemini API.

OperatorEnum - Enum in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
Defines the comparison operators that can be applied to key-value pairs when filtering content based on metadata in the Gemini API.
OTHER - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.BlockedReasonEnum
**Other Reasons:** The content was blocked for reasons other than safety.
OTHER - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.BlockReasonEnum
**Other Reasons:** The input was blocked for reasons other than safety.
OTHER - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.FinishReasonEnum
**Unknown Reason:** The model stopped generating tokens for a reason that is not explicitly categorized by the other enum values.

Q

QUESTION_ANSWERING - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TaskTypeEnum
**Question Answering:** The embedding will be used for question answering tasks, where the goal is to find an answer to a given question within a corpus of text.

R

RECITATION - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.FinishReasonEnum
**Potential Recitation:** The generated content was flagged as being potentially recited from the model's training data.
RelevantChunk - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
The information for a chunk relevant to a query.
RelevantChunk() - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.RelevantChunk
 
RelevantChunk(Double, Chunk) - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.RelevantChunk
 
RelevantChunk.RelevantChunkBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
 
ResourceBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
Builder for creating resource instances for interacting with the Gemini API.
responseSchema - Variable in class com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.GenerationConfigBuilder
 
responseTimeout - Variable in class com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.http.spec.AbstractHttpClient
 
RETRIEVAL_DOCUMENT - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TaskTypeEnum
**Retrieval Document:** The embedding will be used for a retrieval document, representing a document within the corpus being searched.
RETRIEVAL_QUERY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TaskTypeEnum
**Retrieval Query:** The embedding will be used for a retrieval query, where the given text represents a search query.

S

SAFETY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.BlockedReasonEnum
**Safety Violation:** The content was blocked due to safety concerns.
SAFETY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.BlockReasonEnum
**Safety Concerns:** The input was blocked due to safety concerns.
SAFETY - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.FinishReasonEnum
**Safety Violation:** The generated content was flagged by the API's safety system and blocked from being returned.
SafetyRating - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Safety rating for a piece of content.

State - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
Represents the current processing state of a Chunk in the Gemini API.
State() - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.State
 
State(StateEnum) - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.State
 
STATE_ACTIVE - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.StateEnum
**Active Chunk:** The Chunk has been successfully processed and is now available for querying.
STATE_FAILED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.StateEnum
**Failed Processing:** An error occurred during the Chunk's processing, and it is not available for querying.
STATE_PENDING_PROCESSING - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.StateEnum
**Pending Processing:** The Chunk is currently being processed by the Gemini API.
STATE_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.StateEnum
**Unspecified Chunk State:** The state of the Chunk is unspecified or unknown.
State.StateBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
 
StateEnum - Enum in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
Defines the possible processing states of a Chunk in the Gemini API, representing the different stages of its lifecycle.
STOP - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.FinishReasonEnum
**Natural Stop or Stop Sequence:** The model reached a natural stopping point in its generation process, such as the end of a sentence or a logical conclusion to the content.
STRING - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TypeEnum
**String Data Type:** Represents textual data, such as names, descriptions, or any sequence of characters.
StringList - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
User provided string values assigned to a single metadata key.
StringList() - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.StringList
 
StringList(List<String>) - Constructor for class com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.StringList
 
StringList.StringListBuilder - Class in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain
 
SupportedGenerationMethod - Enum in com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type
Represents the supported generation methods for Gemini models, providing a standardized way to identify the different capabilities of each model.
systemInstruction - Variable in class com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.GenerateContentRequestBuilder
 

T

TASK_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED - com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.type.TaskTypeEnum
**Unspecified Task Type:** The task type is unspecified.
